debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
A : Finset ι
m : ℕ
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace Ω
μ : Measure Ω
inst✝² : IsFiniteMeasure μ
mE : MeasurableSpace E
inst✝¹ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝ : InnerProductSpace ℝ E
X : ι → Ω → E
iIndepFun_X : iIndepFun X μ
identDistrib_neg_X : ∀ (i : ι), IdentDistrib (X i) (-X i) μ μ
memLp_X : ∀ i ∈ A, MemLp (X i) (2 * ↑m) μ
this : DecidableEq ι
integrable_prod_norm_X : ∀ I ∈ piFinset fun x => A ×ˢ A, Integrable (fun ω => ∏ k, ‖X (I k).1 ω‖ * ‖X (I k).2 ω‖) μ
integrable_prod_inner_X :
  ∀ I ∈ piFinset fun x => A ×ˢ A, Integrable (fun ω => ∏ k, inner ℝ (X (I k).1 ω) (X (I k).2 ω)) μ
EvenIndex : (Fin m → ι × ι) → Prop := fun I => ∀ i ∈ A, Even ({k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card)
⊢ ∑ I ∈ piFinset fun x => A ×ˢ A with EvenIndex I,
      ∫ (ω : Ω), ∏ i ∈ A, ‖X i ω‖ ^ ({k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card) ∂μ =
    ∑ w ∈ A.piAntidiag (2 * m) with ∀ i ∈ A, 2 ∣ w i, ↑(multinomial A w) * ∫ (ω : Ω), ∏ i ∈ A, ‖X i ω‖ ^ w i ∂μ

apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
      intro I hI
      simp only [mem_filter, mem_piFinset, mem_product, forall_and] at hI
      have h_even : ∀ i ∈ A, Even ({k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card) := hI.2
      let w : ι → ℕ := fun i ↦ if i ∈ A then {k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card else 0
      have hw : w ∈ piAntidiag A (2 * m) := by
        rw [piAntidiag]
        constructor
        · intro i hi
          simp [w, hi]
        · calc
            (∑ i ∈ A, w i)
              = ∑ i ∈ A, ({k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card) := by
                simp [w]
              = (∑ i ∈ A, {k | (I k).1 = i}.card) + (∑ i ∈ A, {k | (I k).2 = i}.card) := by
                simp [Finset.sum_add_distrib]
              = m + m := by
                · rw [← card_sigma_mk, ← card_sigma_mk]
                  congr
                  · ext i
                    simp [hI.1.1]
                  · ext i
                    simp [hI.1.2]
              = 2 * m := by ring
      have hw_even : ∀ i ∈ A, 2 ∣ w i := by
        intro i hi
        simpa [w, hi] using h_even i hi
      have h_multinomial : multinomial A w = (A ×ˢ A ^^ m).filter EvenIndex).card := by
        sorry
      simp [hw, hw_even, h_multinomial]

        -- of multinomial coefficients counting the number of index families I with given fiber counts.
        sorry

apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
      intro I hI
      simp only [mem_filter, mem_piFinset, mem_product] at hI
      have h_even : ∀ i ∈ A, Even ({k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card) := hI.2
      have h_sum : ∑ i ∈ A, ({k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card) = 2 * m := by
        calc
          _ = ∑ i ∈ A, {k | (I k).1 = i}.card + ∑ i ∈ A, {k | (I k).2 = i}.card := by
            simp [Finset.sum_add_distrib]
          _ = ∑ k, ∑ i ∈ A, if (I k).1 = i then 1 else 0 +
                ∑ k, ∑ i ∈ A, if (I k).2 = i then 1 else 0 := by
            rw [← Finset.sum_card_fiberwise (fun k => (I k).1), ← Finset.sum_card_fiberwise (fun k => (I k).2)]
          _ = ∑ k, 1 + ∑ k, 1 := by
            simp [Finset.sum_ite_eq']
          _ = m + m := by simp
          _ = 2 * m := by ring
      let w : ι → ℕ := fun i => if i ∈ A then {k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card else 0
      have hw : w ∈ A.piAntidiag (2 * m) := by
        refine ⟨fun i hi => by simp [w, hi], ?_⟩
        simp [w, h_sum]
      have hw_even : ∀ i ∈ A, 2 ∣ w i := by
        intro i hi
        simp [w, hi]
        exact h_even i hi
      have h_prod : ∏ i ∈ A, ‖X i ω‖ ^ w i = ∏ i ∈ A, ‖X i ω‖ ^ ({k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card) := by
        simp [w]
      have h_multinomial : multinomial A w = (A ×ˢ A ^^ m).filter (fun J => ∀ i ∈ A, {k | (J k).1 = i}.card + {k | (J k).2 = i}.card = w i).card := by
        sorry
      simp [h_prod, h_multinomial, hw, hw_even]
